overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following an eagle flying through a dramatic natural landscape featuring waterfalls, canyons, and mountain ranges. The bird soars from a narrow canyon up over a forested lake, performs a close flyby of a massive waterfall, and transitions to high-altitude mountain terrain.

events.description: eagle ascends from canyon revealing open lake and forest beyond the rim

agents.ego_description: eagle flying upward through canyon with wings spread, gaining altitude toward the waterfall

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with patches of green moss and vegetation
steep rock wall forming the right side of the canyon
large white waterfall cascading down the cliff face
narrow river flowing through the bottom of the canyon
scattered pine trees on top of the canyon rim

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an eagle ascending through a narrow rocky canyon. Tall cliff walls flank both sides with a river flowing below. The bird gains altitude toward a large waterfall visible in the distance, with pine trees lining the canyon rim above.

events.description: eagle banks slightly to align with flight path over the lake
passes over wooden bridge spanning the lake

agents.ego_description: eagle gliding over calm lake water toward the distant waterfall, maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: calm reflective water body surrounded by dense forest
long wooden footbridge crossing the lake
dense green pine trees on the left shore
dense green pine trees on the right shore

segments.scene_description: The eagle emerges from the canyon to fly over a serene forest lake. A wooden footbridge spans the water below as the bird glides toward the waterfall now visible in the mid-distance. Dense pine forests line both shores of the lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall basin with heavy mist spray

events.description: eagle banks sharply right to fly parallel to the waterfall face
flies through mist cloud at base of waterfall
fade to white transition to mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: eagle performing close flyby of waterfall, banking along cliff face through rising mist

entered.detail: white water mist rising from the base of the waterfall
vertical rock wall with water runoff and wet surfaces

segments.scene_description: The eagle approaches the waterfall closely, banking right to fly along the cliff face. Heavy mist rises from the cascade, partially obscuring the view. The bird flies through the spray before a fade transition occurs at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine mountain range with distant peaks

events.description: fade from white reveals high mountain vista with distant peaks

agents.ego_description: eagle soaring over expansive mountain range, gliding between peaks with distant valleys visible

entered.detail: rolling green mountains with rocky outcrops extending to horizon
tall pointed mountain peak visible in the far distance
grass-covered mountain slopes with scattered boulders

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the scene opens to a vast alpine mountain range. The eagle soars high above rolling green peaks with a distinctive spire visible in the far distance. The terrain features grassy slopes and scattered rock formations under a bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that ascends from a confined rocky canyon into a vast, open alpine mountain range. It begins with an eagle climbing through narrow cliff walls above a flowing river, gaining altitude toward a distant waterfall as pine trees appear along the rim. As the bird emerges from the canyon, the environment opens into a serene forest lake featuring a wooden footbridge and dense shoreline greenery. The camera then banks right to fly closely along a cliff face, plunging through the heavy mist and spray of a massive waterfall before transitioning to a high-altitude perspective. Finally, the scene expands into a wide vista of rolling green peaks and scattered rock formations, soaring toward a distinctive spire under a bright sky.
